title: geranium berteroanum var. hispidum
intro: Geranium berteroanum var. hispidum is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as a variety of the Bertero's Geranium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geranium berteroanum var. hispidum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and address various health issues.
